name: 最大连续Sleep Max Consecutive Sleep
desc: Extreme wait loop — agent fires inference.py then loops sleep→check_session_idle 7 times back-to-back (14 wait actions in a row) on inference_session before checking output.

steps.t: Step 328: sleep — first wait of the run
Steps 330-341: sleep ↔ check_session_idle alternation × 6 more (12 more actions)
Run spans steps 328–341 → 14 consecutive wait actions
Step 342: get_session_output finally breaks the loop
Action mix: sleep×130, get_session_output×121, check_session_idle×32 over 369 nodes
